params.prompt:
Using only the evidence below, write polymarket_briefing.md in markdown. Start with a date header, then include exactly three numbered sections with **Current odds:** and **Related news:** in each section.

1. Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the April 2026 meeting?
Current odds: Yes 1% / No 99%
Related news: April 12, 2026 Reuters reported that traders raised bets on a bigger Fed cut after softer inflation data. https://www.reuters.com/world/us/fed-officials-weigh-larger-rate-cut-april-2026-meeting-2026-04-12/

2. Will the Iranian regime fall by April 30?
Current odds: Yes 3% / No 97%
Related news: April 12, 2026 AP reported new protests and succession concerns around Iran's leadership. https://apnews.com/article/iran-protests-leadership-2026-04-12

3. Will Bitcoin reach $150,000 in April?
Current odds: Yes 47% / No 53%
Related news: April 13, 2026 Bloomberg reported that spot ETF inflows stayed strong while traders debated upside targets. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-13/bitcoin-etf-inflows-stay-strong-as-traders-debate-upside-targets
Read polymarket_briefing.md and reply with the Reuters article URL from the first related-news entry only.
